tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search for movies and TV shows

posterThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the poster

backdropThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the backdrop

anyOf.description: Extracted color palette from the title poster image (CSS hex values)

trailerVideoKey.description: YouTube video key for the trailer

Title.description: A fully resolved movie or TV show from TMDB

profileThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the profile photo

Person.description: A person (actor, director, crew member) from TMDB

posterThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the poster

PersonCredit.description: A person's credit in a movie or TV show

stillThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the still image

Season.description: A TV season with its episodes

displayOrder.description: Sort order in the credits list

profileThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the profile photo

CastMember.description: A cast or crew member credit

posterThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the poster

BrowseItem.description: A TMDB title card used in browse/trending/popular lists

posterThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the poster

IntegrationEvent.description: A webhook or sync event from a media server

source.description: How the backup was created: manual, scheduled, or automatic pre-restore

lastDurationMs.description: Duration of last run in milliseconds

lastError.description: Error message from the last failed run

isCurrentlyRunning.description: Whether the job is currently executing

Job.description: Status of a background cron job

tokenValid.description: Whether the API token is valid

responseTimeMs.description: TMDB API response time in milliseconds

error.description: Error message if connectivity check failed

categories.description: Breakdown by image category (posters, backdrops, etc.)

dataDirWritable.description: Whether the data directory is writable

checkedAt.description: When this health check was performed (ISO 8601)

SystemHealth.description: Comprehensive system health report covering database, TMDB, jobs, cache, backups, and environment

get.description: Fetch full title metadata including seasons, cast, and streaming availability. Imports from TMDB on first access if not yet cached locally.

200.description: Full title with seasons, cast, and availability offers

offerType.description: Offer type: flatrate, rent, buy, free, ads

watchUrl.description: Direct link to watch on this provider

items.description: A streaming availability offer from a provider

schema.description: Full title details with seasons, cast, and streaming availability

put.description: Set the user's tracking status for a title. Use null to remove the title from the library entirely.

status.description: Tracking status: in_progress (currently watching), completed (finished), or null to remove from library

schema.description: Update the user's tracking status for a title

put.description: Set a 0-5 star rating for a title. Use 0 to clear the rating.

schema.description: Set or clear a star rating for a title

post.description: Log a watch event for a movie. Automatically sets status to completed.
Mark every episode of a TV show as watched. Requires seasons to be hydrated first.

get.description: Fetch the current user's tracking status, rating, and watched episode IDs for a title.

200.description: User's status, rating, and list of watched episode IDs

status.description: User's tracking status, or null if not in library

rating.description: User's star rating (0-5), or null if unrated

episodeWatches.description: IDs of episodes the user has watched

schema.description: The current user's tracking info for a title

get.description: Fetch similar titles based on locally cached recommendation data, along with the user's statuses for each.

userStatuses.description: Map of title ID to the user's tracking status

schema.description: Recommended titles with the user's statuses

post.description: Add a title to the user's watchlist and trigger a full TMDB import if needed. If the title already exists in the user's library, returns alreadyAdded: true.

200.description: Title ID and whether it was already in the library

alreadyAdded.description: True if the title was already in the user's library

post.description: Record a watch event for a single TV episode.
Remove the watch record for a single TV episode.
Record watch events for multiple episodes at once. Useful for marking a range of episodes as watched.

episodeIds.description: List of episode IDs to mark as watched

schema.description: Batch of episode IDs to mark as watched

post.description: Mark all episodes in a season as watched in a single operation.
Remove all watch records for episodes in a season in a single operation.

get.description: Fetch a person's profile and paginated filmography. Imports from TMDB on first access if not yet cached locally.

200.description: Person profile, paginated filmography credits, and user statuses for their titles

userStatuses.description: Map of title ID to the user's tracking status

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

schema.description: Person profile with paginated filmography and user's statuses for their titles

get.description: Fetch summary counts for the current user: movies watched this month, episodes this week, library size, and completed titles.

moviesThisMonth.description: Movies watched in the current calendar month

episodesThisWeek.description: Episodes watched in the current calendar week

librarySize.description: Total titles in the user's library

schema.description: Aggregate watch statistics for the dashboard

get.description: Fetch TV shows the user is currently watching, with the next unwatched episode and progress for each.

200.description: In-progress shows with next episode and watch progress

backdropThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the backdrop

stillThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the still

nextEpisode.description: Next unwatched episode, or null if all caught up

items.description: An in-progress show with watch progress

schema.description: TV shows the user is currently watching with next episode info

get.description: Fetch paginated titles in the user's library with their tracking statuses.

200.description: Paginated library items with user statuses

posterThumbHash.description: ThumbHash blur placeholder for the poster

items.description: A library item with user status

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

schema.description: Paginated titles in the user's library

get.description: Fetch personalized title recommendations based on the user's library and watch history.

schema.description: Personalized title recommendations for the dashboard

get.description: Fetch the user's watch counts grouped by time period. Useful for rendering activity charts.

schema.description: What to count: movie watches or episode watches

200.description: Watch counts bucketed by time period

count.description: Total watches in the selected period

bucket.description: Time period label (e.g. date or week)

count.description: Number of watches in this bucket

history.description: Watch counts bucketed by time period

get.description: Fetch today's trending movies and/or TV shows from TMDB, including a featured hero title and the user's statuses.

schema.description: Trending category: all, movie, or tv

200.description: Trending items, hero spotlight, and user statuses

hero.description: Featured hero title for the spotlight banner

userStatuses.description: Map of title ID to the user's tracking status

episodeProgress.description: Map of title ID to episode watch progress

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

schema.description: Trending titles with hero spotlight and user statuses

message.default: TMDB API key is not configured

get.description: Fetch currently popular movies or TV shows from TMDB with the user's tracking statuses.

userStatuses.description: Map of title ID to the user's tracking status

episodeProgress.description: Map of title ID to episode watch progress

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

schema.description: Browse results with user tracking statuses and episode progress

message.default: TMDB API key is not configured

get.description: Fetch the list of TMDB genres for movies or TV shows. Used to populate genre filters for discovery.

message.default: TMDB API key is not configured

get.summary: Search movies, TV shows, and people
get.description: Full-text search across movies, TV shows, and people via TMDB. Optionally filter by media type.

schema.description: Optional type filter to narrow results

id.description: Internal title ID (present for movie/tv results, absent for people)

overview.description: Plot summary or null for people

knownFor.description: Notable works (people only, up to 3 titles)

items.description: A search result (movie, TV show, or person)

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

message.default: TMDB API key is not configured

get.description: Browse movies or TV shows filtered by genre, sorted by popularity. Returns user statuses and episode progress.

schema.description: TMDB genre ID to filter by

userStatuses.description: Map of title ID to the user's tracking status

episodeProgress.description: Map of title ID to episode watch progress

totalResults.description: Total number of results across all pages

schema.description: Browse results with user tracking statuses and episode progress

message.default: TMDB API key is not configured

get.description: Fetch public information about this Sofa instance. Does not require authentication. Used by the login screen to display instance details.

registrationOpen.description: Whether new user registration is open

posterUrls.description: Poster image URLs for the login screen collage

schema.description: Public instance information shown on the login/setup screen

get.description: Fetch the authentication configuration including OIDC availability, password login status, and registration state. Does not require authentication.

oidcProviderName.description: Display name of the OIDC provider (e.g. Authelia, Keycloak)

registrationOpen.description: Whether new user registration is open

get.description: Returns internal configuration such as the public API URL. Requires authentication.

publicApiUrl.description: Base URL of the centralized public API

schema.description: Internal system configuration for authenticated clients

get.description: Fetch all configured media server integrations for the current user, including recent webhook/sync events for each.

schema.description: All integrations with their recent events

post.description: Create a new media server integration or update an existing one. Generates a unique webhook token for the provider.

enabled.description: Whether the integration starts enabled (default: true)

schema.description: Create a new media server integration

200.description: Created or updated integration with token

delete.description: Remove a media server integration and all its event history.

post.description: Generate a new webhook token for an integration. The old token is immediately invalidated.

get.description: Fetch all database backups with their sizes and creation times.

post.description: Create a new manual database backup. The backup is tagged as a manual backup.

delete.description: Permanently delete a database backup file by filename.

post.description: Upload a database backup file and restore it. A pre-restore backup is automatically created before overwriting the current database.

get.description: Fetch the current automated backup schedule configuration.

dayOfWeek.description: Day of week for weekly backups (0 = Sunday)

put.description: Update the automated backup schedule. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields keep their current values.

time.description: Time of day to run backups (HH:MM, 24-hour format)

dayOfWeek.description: Day of week for weekly backups (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday)

maxRetention.description: Maximum number of backups to keep (0 = unlimited, 1-30 otherwise)

schema.description: Partial update to the automated backup schedule

get.description: Check whether new user registration is currently open or closed.

open.description: Whether new user registration is open

put.description: Open or close new user registration.

open.description: Whether new user registration is allowed

get.description: Fetch whether automatic update checks are enabled, and the latest cached check result if available.

200.description: Update check configuration and latest result

enabled.description: Whether automatic update checks are enabled

updateAvailable.description: Whether a newer version is available

latestVersion.description: Latest available version, or null if check failed

releaseUrl.description: URL to the latest release page

lastCheckedAt.description: When the last check was performed (ISO 8601)

anyOf.description: Result of an update availability check

updateCheck.description: Latest check result, or null if checks are disabled or never ran

schema.description: Update check configuration and latest result

put.description: Enable or disable automatic update checks against the public API.

enabled.description: Whether automatic update checks are enabled

get.description: Fetch whether anonymous telemetry is enabled and when the last report was sent.

200.description: Telemetry configuration and last report time

lastReportedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last telemetry report, or null if never sent

schema.description: Telemetry configuration and last report time

put.description: Enable or disable anonymous telemetry reporting.

enabled.description: Whether anonymous telemetry reporting is enabled

post.description: Manually trigger a background cron job by name. The job runs asynchronously.

schema.description: Specify which background job to trigger manually

post.description: Delete un-enriched stub titles not in any user's library and clean up orphaned person records.

200.description: Counts of deleted titles and persons

deletedTitles.description: Number of un-enriched stub titles deleted

deletedPersons.description: Number of orphaned person records deleted

schema.description: Result of purging un-enriched metadata from the database

post.description: Delete all cached TMDB images from disk. Images will be re-downloaded on demand.

200.description: Count of deleted files and bytes freed

deletedFiles.description: Number of image files deleted from disk

schema.description: Result of purging the image cache from disk

get.description: Comprehensive health check covering database, TMDB connectivity, cron jobs, image cache, backups, and environment.

put.description: Change the current user's display name.

post.description: Upload a new profile avatar image. Accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 2 MB.

200.description: URL of the uploaded avatar image

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded avatar image

delete.description: Delete the current user's profile avatar, reverting to the default.

post.description: Upload and parse an export file from Trakt, Simkl, or Letterboxd. Returns a preview of items found without importing anything.

200.description: Preview of importable items with counts

post.description: Accept pre-normalized import data from the OAuth proxy and return a preview with item counts. No parsing is needed — data is already in NormalizedImport format.

200.description: Preview of importable items with counts

post.description: Create and start a background import job from previously parsed data.

importWatches.description: Import movie and episode watch history

message.default: An import is already in progress

get.description: Get the current status and progress of an import job.

post.description: Cancel a pending or running import job. Already-imported items are not rolled back.

get.description: SSE stream of import job progress events. Yields progress updates and a final complete event.
